caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses and a white dress shirt with a bowtie, sits in a studio environment. He wears a tall, spiky, grey-colored wig and large black over-ear headphones. In front of him is a black microphone on a boom arm. The background is filled with framed photographs and clothing racks displaying various shirts. A red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as his facial expressions shift slightly. He remains seated in the same position throughout, facing slightly to the left while speaking into the microphone. The setting remains static, with the only movement being the man's speech and slight head adjustments.
